lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: What was wrong with the water in Jericho?
answers: It was bad and crops would not grow
It was too salty to drink

questions.text: What did Elisha do to fix the water?
answers: He put salt in it and it became pure
He parted the waters in two

questions.text: What problem did the poor widow have?
answers: Her sons might be taken as slaves because of the money she owed

questions.text: How did Elisha help the widow?
answers: Her oil multiplied and filled many jars
He prayed for God to send her bread from heaven

questions.text: What promise did Elisha give to the woman who let him stay at her house?
answers: She would have a baby in a year

questions.text: What happened one year after Elisha’s promise?
What happened to her son later?
How did Elisha help the dead boy?
answers: He prayed and stretched out on him, and the boy came back to life
He sent for an angel to take the boy to heaven
He tapped the boy with his staff seven times

questions.text: What was wrong with the stew, and how was it fixed?
answers: It was poisonous; Elisha added flour and it became safe
It was too cold, so he heated it up
It tasted gross, so he added salt and pepper
It was burned, but he ate it anyways

questions.text: What miracle did Elisha do with bread?
answers: He prayed for bread to come down from heaven
He taught the men how to make sandwiches
